overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the colorful medieval city of Beauclair. The character ascends multiple stone staircases through narrow passages and emerges into a vibrant sunlit plaza with distinctive Mediterranean architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with stone stairs and wooden barrels

events.description: character begins ascending the worn stone stairs
passes through the stone archway into a covered section

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stone stairs in a narrow courtyard, passing wooden barrels and a seated NPC

notable_agents.action: seated figure in purple robes beside wooden barrels

entered.detail: wide worn stone stairs ascending through the courtyard
stacked wooden barrels and crates against the wall
tall weathered stone wall with rough texture
stone archway marking the passage to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow stone courtyard where Geralt ascends a wide staircase. Wooden barrels line the left side near a seated NPC, while tall stone walls enclose the right. The character walks toward and passes through a stone archway at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with stone balustrade overlooking red roofs

events.description: passes close by an armored guard standing against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated covered walkway with views of red tiled roofs below

notable_agents.action: armored guard in blue plate armor standing at attention against the building
pedestrian in red tunic walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with decorative pillars overlooking the lower level
steep red terracotta roof of the building below the walkway
warm orange stone building wall with arched doorways

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated covered walkway, the camera passes an armored guard standing against the orange stone facade. To the left, a stone balustrade reveals views of steep red tiled roofs below. The character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding stone path with flowering bushes approaching dark stairway

events.description: approaching the darker enclosed stairway entrance ahead
entering the narrow dark stairway between high stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking along a cobblestone path lined with flowering bushes and potted plants

man in green and orange clothing passing by

entered.detail: lush green bushes with bright pink flowers
narrow stone stairway entrance between high walls leading upward
large terracotta pots with green shrubs

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the building facade, now lined with flowering bushes and potted plants. The character passes several pedestrians before approaching a dark, narrow stairway entrance between high stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow enclosed stairway with high stone walls

events.description: bright sunlight becomes visible at the top of the stairs creating strong backlight
nearing the top of the stairway, approaching the bright exit arch

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs through a narrow passage toward the bright light above

entered.detail: tall rough stone walls creating a narrow passage on both sides
sunlit archway at the top of the stairs creating strong backlight

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep, narrow stairway completely enclosed by high stone walls. The lighting is dim until bright sunlight becomes visible at the top, creating a strong backlight effect as the character approaches the exit arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with colorful buildings and descending stairs to plaza

events.description: exiting the dark stairway into bright sunlight on the upper terrace
turning left and beginning to descend curved stairs into the main plaza

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark stairs into bright sunlight, turning left and descending toward the plaza

entered.detail: vibrant blue and red historic buildings with ornate gables visible ahead
curved stone stairs leading down to the plaza level
decorative stone balustrade along the descending stairs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark stairs into bright sunlight, the character turns left on an upper terrace. Colorful historic buildings with ornate gables become visible in the distance as the character begins descending a curved stone staircase toward the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: vibrant town square with red cobblestones and colorful facades

events.description: entering the open plaza with distinctive red cobblestones and surrounding colorful buildings
slowing to look around at the architecture, then turning right toward a narrow street

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza, admiring the colorful architecture and looking around at the surroundings

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking through the plaza

entered.detail: wide open square paved with distinctive red cobblestones
tall blue historic building with white trim and flower boxes
vibrant pink stone building with arched windows
tall stone column with statue on top in the plaza center
tall red stone tower with clock face and pointed roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant open plaza paved with distinctive red cobblestones. Surrounded by colorful historic buildings including a prominent blue gabled house and pink stone facade, the character explores the square, passing a tall stone column monument and clock tower before heading toward a narrow street exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone courtyard through narrow urban passages and finally into a vibrant, sunlit city plaza. It begins with Geralt ascending a wide staircase past wooden barrels and through a stone archway, which leads onto an elevated walkway featuring orange stone facades and views of red tiled roofs. As the path continues past flowering bushes and pedestrians, the camera follows the character into a dim, narrow stairway enclosed by high walls. The scene then shifts from this shadow into a burst of bright sunlight as the character emerges onto an upper terrace, descending a curved staircase toward the city below. Finally, the environment opens completely into a wide plaza of red cobblestones, surrounded by colorful gabled buildings, a stone column monument, and a clock tower.
